docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-24-2023 - TRANSFERRED FORTHWITH TO BE HEARD IN DEPT 502 BEFORE JUDGE ROSS TO MAR-24-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 502. DEFENDANT NOT STIPULATION FOR CASE TO BE HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
